info.name: Employee Management System - gRPC
info.description:
Pure gRPC collection for all EMS gRPC services.

IMPORT STEPS:
1. Import this file into Postman (File -> Import)
2. Also import EMS-Environment.json and select 'EMS Local' environment
3. For each request, go to Service definition tab -> import the .proto file from the project
4. Press Invoke

Ports (host-mapped for Postman access):
  Payroll    -> localhost:15051   proto: grpc-service/payroll.proto
  Auth       -> localhost:15052   proto: auth-service/grpc/proto/auth.proto
  Leave      -> localhost:15053   proto: leave-service/grpc/proto/leave.proto
  Department -> localhost:15054   proto: department-service/grpc/proto/department.proto

item.name: Payroll Service
item.description:
Server: grpc://localhost:15051
Proto: grpc-service/payroll.proto
Package: payroll

request.description:
Calculates final salary after tax deduction.

Request:
  baseSalary (double) - gross salary before tax

Response:
  finalSalary  (double) - salary after deduction
  taxDeduction (double) - amount deducted
  taxRate      (double) - tax rate applied (e.g. 0.1 = 10%)

grpcurl:
  grpcurl -plaintext -d '{"baseSalary":95000}' localhost:15051 payroll.PayrollService/CalculateSalary

item.name: Auth Service
item.description:
Server: grpc://localhost:15052
Proto: auth-service/grpc/proto/auth.proto
Package: auth

request.description:
Validates a JWT bearer token.
Run 'Login' in the REST collection first to get {{token}}.

Request:
  token (string) - JWT token

Response:
  valid  (bool)   - true if token is valid
  userId (string) - decoded user ID
  email  (string) - decoded email
  role   (string) - decoded role
  error  (string) - reason if invalid

grpcurl:
  grpcurl -plaintext -d '{"token":"<jwt>"}' localhost:15052 auth.AuthService/ValidateToken

Fetches a user record by ID.
{{user_id}} is auto-set by the Register test script in the REST collection.

Request:
  userId (string) - auth user ID

Response:
  found      (bool)   - true if user exists
  id         (string) - user ID
  email      (string) - user email
  role       (string) - user role
  employeeId (string) - linked employee ID (if set)

grpcurl:
  grpcurl -plaintext -d '{"userId":"<id>"}' localhost:15052 auth.AuthService/GetUser

item.name: Leave Service
item.description:
Server: grpc://localhost:15053
Proto: leave-service/grpc/proto/leave.proto
Package: leave

request.description:
Returns the remaining leave balance for an employee.
{{employee_id}} is auto-set by Create Employee in the REST collection.

Request:
  employeeId (string) - employee ID

Response:
  annualBalance  (int32) - remaining annual leaves
  sickBalance    (int32) - remaining sick leaves
  casualBalance  (int32) - remaining casual leaves
  usedAnnual     (int32) - used annual leaves
  usedSick       (int32) - used sick leaves
  usedCasual     (int32) - used casual leaves

grpcurl:
  grpcurl -plaintext -d '{"employeeId":"<id>"}' localhost:15053 leave.LeaveService/GetLeaveBalance

Returns all leave requests for an employee.

Request:
  employeeId (string) - employee ID

Response:
  leaves[] - array of LeaveRecord:
    id        (string) - leave request ID
    employeeId(string)
    type      (string) - annual | sick | casual
    startDate (string) - YYYY-MM-DD
    endDate   (string) - YYYY-MM-DD
    status    (string) - pending | approved | rejected
    reason    (string)

grpcurl:
  grpcurl -plaintext -d '{"employeeId":"<id>"}' localhost:15053 leave.LeaveService/GetEmployeeLeaves

Fetches a single department by ID.
{{dept_id}} is auto-set by Create Department in the REST collection.

Request:
  id (string) - department ID

Response:
  found       (bool)   - true if department exists
  id          (string)
  name        (string)
  description (string)
  managerId   (string)
  budget      (double)

grpcurl:
  grpcurl -plaintext -d '{"id":"<id>"}' localhost:15054 department.DepartmentService/GetDepartment

Returns all departments.
Send an empty message body {}.

Response:
  departments[] - array of DepartmentItem:
    id          (string)
    name        (string)
    description (string)
    managerId   (string)
    budget      (double)

grpcurl:
  grpcurl -plaintext -d '{}' localhost:15054 department.DepartmentService/GetAllDepartments

Checks whether a department with the given name exists.

Request:
  name (string) - exact department name (case-sensitive)

Response:
  exists (bool)   - true if found
  id     (string) - department ID (only populated when exists=true)

grpcurl:
  grpcurl -plaintext -d '{"name":"Engineering"}' localhost:15054 department.DepartmentService/DepartmentExists
